review_text: I recently visited Ibn Al Sham restaurant and it was a really enjoyable experience . The place has a very warm and welcoming atmosphere that immediately makes you feel comfortable . The decoration gives strong Levantine vibes , and the smell of freshly grilled food makes you excited to try everything on the menu . The food was honestly the highlight of the visit . Everything tasted fresh and full of flavor . The grilled meats were perfectly cooked , juicy , and well - seasoned . The shawarma was also very good , with soft bread and a generous amount of filling . One thing I really liked was the variety of appetizers . The hummus , fattoush , and mutabbal were all delicious and tasted very authentic . The portions were great as well , which makes the place perfect for sharing with friends or family . You can order a few dishes and everyone can try a bit of everything . The presentation of the food was simple but very appetizing . The staff were friendly and helpful throughout the visit . The service was relatively fast and they were attentive without being intrusive . Overall , Ibn Al Sham is a great place if you’re craving good Syrian and Levantine food . Between the tasty dishes , generous portions , and comfortable atmosphere , it’s definitely a spot worth visiting again . I would absolutely recommend it to anyone who enjoys flavorful Middle Eastern cuisine .

Buffet breakfast at the ground floor provided a really good spread . So much food that caters to various diets . Waiters were also very quick to clear plates . As it was Ramadan there weren’t many restaurants open in the city . I had settled most of my other meals at the rooftop restaurant . Food was as solid as the view though it took quite a while to arrive . Gym was small but very functional and does its job . Dumbbells range from 5kg and goes all the way up to 40kg . There’s also a multi - functional machine that covers all areas - chest , shoulders , back , legs . Gym is open till midnight . Towels provided , complete with a water dispenser and disposable cups . Good gym ! Special mention : I had to check - out a day early as my original flights were canceled due to the war in the Middle East . The hotel was really gracious in making an exception in refunding me for the 1 night that I had booked but didn’t stay . This was a really nice gesture .

review_text: During Ramadan , the whole population tolerates the fasting of Muslims and foregoes any semblance of normal provision of food . Ok . Islam the majority population and the official religion and they control . That inconveniences non - muslim citizens and all the foreigners who live and visit . But it's an Islamic country . Ok . This restaurant menu has ten items marked "Fasting , " by which they mean the Coptic days of fasting , which are 2/3 of the days of the year . These salads are without animal products . It is respectful , thoughtful , for Oldish to mark these menu items for those who don't eat animals , or don't eat animals on certain days . We love it when restaurants give a nod to vegetarians and vegans . Oldish looks like a place that serve the whole demographic of Egypt's people . This year , Ramadan coincides with the Copts LONG fast - - 55 days long ! For 55 days the native Egyptian population is vegan . But . When i tried to order the "fasting" ( vegan ) salad at Oldish , "We do not have it available now , because it's Ramadan . " So because Muslims are observing THEIR fast ( eat anytime when the sun is down . anything you want . ) , the restaurant STOPS serving the food that is suitable for Copts , who are abstaining from all animal products for 55 days . The menu showing "fasting - friendly" food is here on the restaurant's google map listing . Beware . During Ramadan , expect peak chaos . Not being a vegetarian today , I ordered the Hawawshi and Oldish Salad shown here and I left most of it on the plate . Not good by any standards at all . Possibly Oldish is ok for a quaint downtown coffee date . End of rant .

review_text: "Terrible Experience at Abou El Sid in Zamalek – Would Not Recommend" We went to Abou El Sid in Zamalek yesterday for Iftar , and honestly , the experience was terrible . There’s no proper ventilation in the place—after just a few hours , our clothes reeked of smoke and we had kids us . The furniture is old and very uncomfortable to sit on , which made the whole experience even more unpleasant . We had pre - ordered our Iftar the day before , but when it was time to serve , several items were missing—including the desserts , which they said were “no longer available . ” The food itself arrived cold , and the taste was below average . Considering the high price per person , the quality is just not justified . It’s definitely not worth the money . The service was by far the worst part . The restaurant seemed understaffed , and we had to wait a long time just to get someone’s attention to order anything . Interestingly , when it was time to pay , they were suddenly very attentive and quick . Overall , our experience as a family was extremely disappointing . I’d give this place 1 star across the board . Despite its reputation , we will never visit again .

review_text: Favosissimo ristorante situato nel Centro storico del ononimo bazar del Cairo . Famosa la sua cucina egiziana e mediorientale , un ambiente di superba raffinatezza di eleganza , offre anche cucina halal e vegetarian . Per chi stanco dello shopping , una visita qui e' l'idéale per una pausa per un aperitivo o caffe' con una bella musica dal vivo . Anche se un poco difficile arrivarci , ma poi sarete appagati dalla sua atmosfera che vi offre . Dichiarato come luogo élégante , pulito , nell'immergersi in questo locale Nella sua vita ci si sente catapultati in una diversa dimensione . Attenzione , non chiedere alcolici , e' severamente proibito la somministrazione . La sua cucina e' tradizionale , falafel , hummus , manzo , pollo , con un servizio che offre il narghilé .

review_text: To Lebanese food enthusiasts who adore the original Lebanese food experience , I can now confirm that Zahrat Lebnan Restaurant is the true deal . Since a long period of time , I have been longing to the original Lebanese cuisine in Cairo . The moment you go into the restaurant you will feel the real Lebanese hospitality and the ambience . I met Abo Zayd and he was really professional with his warm welcome and the great attention to details you rarely find nowadays with staff due to the high cluttered restaurants which caused the lack of high caliber hospitality people and staff . Secondly , the food ! ! I wasn’t hungry that day but I came with my friend who wanted to have dinner . Out of curiosity , and with the very soft and professional sell of Abo Zayd , I couldn’t resist his clever suggestions . At the very first bite , I was surprised to a great extent of how authentic the food taste was ! The taste is incredibly lasting and it addresses all my senses ! Ingredients were of a very high quality and the presentation of the dishes were very inviting to try and here is the trap ! ! ! You can’t stop eating and enjoying the authentic Lebanese cuisine . I raise my hat to lots of people here : the chef , the hospitality crew and the headquarters training instructors who did a great job to choose the right calibers . Thank you all so much for making this experience so much fun and memorable . I truly hope that the management would consider not to waste time and expand in New Zayed , Fifth Settlement , and Heliopolis where the the true Lebanese enthusiasts would highly appreciate this restaurant in their municipalities . Thank you all for this and wishing all the success . Thumbs up : thumbs_up_light_skin_tone : and highly recommended place should you appreciate the Lebanese magic food EMO_POS

review_text: I visited El Dahhan during Ramadan and honestly the food quality was incredibly high . In a time where many brands rely on heavy marketing and hype , this place actually delivers . The taste felt very authentic Egyptian flavorful , well - seasoned , not overly greasy , and just genuinely satisfying . The staff were also very friendly , but because of the Ramadan rush it felt like they might not have been able to keep up with every small detail for all the guests . That’s understandable with the huge crowds during iftar time . Overall , it was a really great experience and definitely worth the price . I’d happily go back again and again , during Ramadan and even outside of it . For me , El Dahhan is truly one of the best real grilled food spots not just a compliment , but an honest opinion because food quality really matters to me .

review_text: Premetto che sono italiana . . . Dopo aver assaggiato cibo egiziano per 3 giorni di seguito volevamo prenderci una pausa culinaria e abbiamo optato per questo ristorante . Alla fine ci siamo ritornati anche la sera successiva , perché era tutto delizioso ! Ci lavora una famiglia di persone italo - egiziane che hanno vissuto in Italia per anni e quindi conoscono e sanno replicare alla perfezione i veri sapori italiani , utilizzando anche gli ingredienti giusti . L'atmosfera è molto piacevole e il locale è decorato con immagini che ricordano l'Italia . Inoltre i gestori sono gentili e simpatici : Mahmoud parla benissimo l'italiano ( con tanto di accento romano ! ) e abbiamo conosciuto anche il cuoco Mishu . La pasta è cucinata alla perfezione : cottura al dente e salse molto curate e delicate nei sapori . Buonissima la pasta al salmone , la cacio e pepe , l'antipasto di mozzarella stick e le pizze . Consigliatissimo agli italiani e anche ai turisti che cercano una vera cucina italiana al Cairo ! ! !

Ordering Intelligence : She has an excellent ability to explain the menu and recommend dishes that perfectly suited our tastes , and the choices were absolutely perfect . Speed ​​and Attention to Detail : Even though the place was busy , she kept an eye on every detail of the table , ensuring we didn't need to order twice . Professionalism : It's rare to find someone who understands the "principles of hospitality" so well—eloquent , quick - witted , and attentive to the smallest details . Summary : Bistro Nasr City is always a great choice , but having staff like Mariam is what makes us want to come back again and again . She's a wonderful representative of the restaurant and a perfect example of a successful manager who truly knows how to win over customers . review_text: للاسف تجربة اسوء ما يكون لما دكتور يبلغ المريض و اهله ان فيه ورم ولازم تدخل سريع ولازم ندخل عمليات حالا و هنقص الامعاء و نشيل و نفتح في الجنب و نركب كيس خارجي للاخراج و لما اتكلمنا و سالنا طاب فيه اي حاجة تاكد التشخيص يبصلنا بقرف و يقرر انه يمشي و يسيبنا و يقولنا انت بتفتوا او بتقولوا اي كلام لما دكتور ياكد ان المشكلة ورم بنسبة ٩٩٪؜ و لما نسال هي حاله المريض تسمح بعملية زي ديه و يقول اصل لو معملتوش العملية هتموت و لو عملتوها و حصل خطا خلاص مش فارقه … وطالما انتوا مش عايزين عملية يبقي اكتبوا تعهد و امضوا و عشان الحمد لله ربنا بيحبنا خرجنا من المستشفي و رحنا لدكتور تاني و اول كلمه قالها ان ده مش ورم وان ده انعكاس الامعاء في الاشعه و الحمد لله روحنا مستشفي تانية محترمه و بيفهموا و بيعرفوا يتعاملوا مع المريض انه انسان و في ازمة صحية و عملنا العملية و مطلعش ورم و طلع انسداد معوي بسبب التصاقات في الامعاء ، ياريت لو يبقي عندكم دكاتره بتفهم و تعرف تتعامل مع المرضي ازاي و يبقي انسان يعرف يقول ايه و يتكلم ازاي مش يبقي بيحاول يضغط علي المرضي عشان ياخدوا اجراء مش محتاجين ليه بغرض سحب فلوس من المريض و استغلاله لو الكلام ده من دكتور صغير ساعتها نقول معلش قلة خبرة بس لما يبقي استشاري الجراحة دكتور علاء الدين عبد الله فراج يبقي مش عارفة اقول ايه غير حسبي الله و نعم الوكيل فيك

review_text: Ein unvergesslicher Zufallsfund – absolut authentisch und herzlich ! Was als spontaner Umweg begann , wurde zu einem der schönsten Essenserlebnisse unserer Reise . Unser aufmerksamer Taxifahrer – dem wir ewig dankbar sein werden – empfahl uns dieses versteckte Juwel , als wir nach einem Ort suchten , der uns während des Ramadans mit echten ägyptischen Falafel versorgen konnte . Was dann folgte , hat uns wirklich überwältigt : Obwohl es tagsüber während des Ramadans war , hat die Küche eigens für uns den Ofen angeworfen und ein wunderbares Mahl gezaubert . Die Falafel waren schlichtweg perfekt – superkross , frisch und voller Geschmack , genau so , wie sie sein sollen . Dazu gab es frisch gebackenes Pita - Brot , einen knackigen Salat mit reifen Tomaten , Gurken und aromatischen Kräutern , eine cremige Mischung aus Frischkäse , Tomaten und Gurken sowie knusprige Pommes mit einem herrlich würzigen Topping . Das Herzerwärmendste war die Gastfreundschaft – man hat sich wirklich die Mühe gemacht , uns zu bewirten , obwohl der Betrieb zu dieser Zeit normalerweise ruhte . Das ist echter ägyptischer Charakter . Und das Beste? Das gesamte Festmahl für gerade einmal ca . 2 Euro pro Person . Unschlagbar . Wer auf der Suche nach authentischer ägyptischer Küche und echter Herzlichkeit ist , sollte unbedingt hierher kommen – am besten mit einem ortskundigen Taxifahrer ! : egypt :

review_text: Om Kalthoum Hotel – Two Stays , Two Perspectives Having stayed at Om Kalthoum Hotel on two separate occasions , I was able to get a good sense of what the hotel does well and where expectations should be managed . During our first stay , we were on the 16th floor in a room without a view , but it was surprisingly spacious and better furnished than expected . The room included a microwave , hairdryer , and a TV on a rotating mount , which made the space feel practical and comfortable . Our second stay was on the 2nd floor with a view . While both rooms clearly showed their age , they were in line with what we’ve come to expect from mid - range hotels in Egypt . On our late January 2026 visit , it was clear that renovations were actively underway . Several rooms were completely stripped down and being rebuilt , which is a very positive sign . Future guests will likely benefit greatly once this work is completed . Cleanliness was good overall . One small observation is that the softer , fluffier towels seemed to be reserved for the gym rather than the rooms . Noise levels were interestingly inconsistent . Street noise was actually worse on the 16th floor . Either we adjusted over time , or the windows on the lower floors offered better insulation . Wi - Fi was slow and unreliable , making it unsuitable for work or streaming . We relied on mobile data tethering for anything important . Breakfast was a standout . The selection changed regularly , and the variety was impressive — including items like blue cheese on one morning . This was easily one of the strongest aspects of the stay . Most of the staff spoke good English , with only one or two exceptions , and everyone was polite and helpful . Pricing , however , felt uneven : the 2nd - floor room with a view didn’t quite justify the higher cost in its current condition . As with many hotels in Egypt , the hot water was extremely hot , bordering on scalding . Tips for future guests : Don’t rely on the Wi - Fi; mobile data works far better . Lower floors may be quieter than higher ones . Renovations are ongoing , so conditions should improve . Ask staff to turn on the power in the gym if needed . Be cautious with the hot water . Overall , Om Kalthoum Hotel offers generous room sizes , excellent breakfast , and helpful staff , with clear signs of improvement on the way .

review_text: The food we ordered was really good but there were a few dishes ewe had which could have been better . The serving sizes were really generous though and for two propel we could hardly finish all the dishes , so I would recommend this for a bigger group of people to really enjoy all the dishes the place has to offer . The service from Amir , out waiter , was really incredible though ! It was our first wedding anniversary and they went above and beyond to organise something really special ( they had the chef come out and I helped make the traditional dish Mulukhiyah as a special surprise ) for our anniversary on top of the dessert . ( بيحبوا يسرقوا الناس الصغيرين تقريبا ) لما قولتله سني رجع في كلامه ، حكيتله علي اللي الويتر عمله وان طريقته وحشة ومبيعرفش يتعامل مع الناس لقيت الويتر جه و شتمني قدامهم كلهم وقدام المانچر نفسه وقاللي انا مقولتش حاجة وانتي قليلة الادب ومحدش عمله حاجة خالص كتر خيرهم قالوله خش جوة هيوقفوه تقريبا في النوتي كورنر رافع ايده : face_with_tears_of_joy : اول ما قولت اني هبلغ البوليس والناس اللي قاعدة في المكان شاهدين و الكاميرات موجودة طلع يجري وكلهم اتلموا عليا بيقولولي انتي صاحبة مكان : grinning_face_with_sweat : اخر كلمة قولتها للمانچر لو بنتك قاعدة في مكان ترضي ان حد يشتمها ومحدش يعمله حاجة مردش ( ما هو يا دة مش المانچر وحد بيبعتوه يضحك بس عشان محدش يطالب بحقه يا دة المانچر فعلا بس سلبي جدا ومبيعرفش يتصرف )

review_text: This used to be my favorite place to buy dresses and I always recommended it . After my last visit , I will never step inside again . We found a suit we were fully ready to purchase . We simply asked about minor tailoring adjustments and mentioned that the white pants were slightly transparent . Instead of helping , the CFC store manager , Maria , immediately responded with attitude and arrogance . She told us that if it is not our style then it is not for us and that many popular people wear it , so the problem is ours and not the design . When I asked for the tailor to come so I could show the adjustments I wanted , she refused to even let him see the suit and shut the discussion down completely . Her manner was dismissive , condescending , and openly disrespectful . There was no attempt to assist , no professionalism , and no basic courtesy . The whole interaction felt uncomfortable and unwelcoming rather than a customer service experience . A store manager represents the brand , and this behavior reflected extremely poorly on it . Because of this experience I will not return and I will actively warn anyone who asks me about this store . One of the worst retail experiences I have had .

review_text: Guys , so you're in Cairo and you don't know where to eat but you want to spend a tiny amount of money and at the same time have an amazingly nice and filling dinner? Thank God , this place does exist ! It is in Zamalek , and it is Dido's ! ! ! Fantastic food , fantastic portions , fantastic service , fantastic prices . We had one pizza , one huge portion of penne in a blue cheese , the fried rice balls and the bruschetta as a starter and we paid . . . 11 Euros . . . Then we had the tuna salad , the amazing arabiatta with chicken and the even better lasagna and we paid . . . 10 Euros . . . I forgot to include the drinks . . . Can you believe it? The guys are super friendly , need to add more? It is a small place , it has 10 tables , the atmosphere is cozy , the music super cool international and not loud , they do a lot of take aways . Guys , I only took a photo of the fried rice balls ( arancini ) because I was so eager to eat the food . Sorry about this . Don't even think about it . Go .

review_text: Ich war heute bei Frau Dr . Hala wegen meiner Schilddrüse . Ich hatte alle meine gesammelten Testergebnisse vom letzten Jahr ordentlich mitgebracht , um ihr einen Überblick zu geben . Leider war der Termin sehr enttäuschend . Bereits im Gespräch hat sie mich vor ihrer Assistentin – die ohne ersichtlichen Grund mit im Behandlungszimmer saß – kritisiert und regelrecht „fertig gemacht“ , weil ich bestimmte Untersuchungen habe durchführen lassen . Ich empfand das als sehr unangenehm und respektlos , vor allem da ein Arzt - Patienten - Gespräch auf Vertrauen und Diskretion basieren sollte . Zusätzlich wurde ich mehrfach gedrängt , den Namen meines vorherigen Arztes zu nennen . Nachdem ich ihn genannt hatte , wurde dieser von ihr als unfähig bezeichnet . Ein solches Verhalten gegenüber Kollegen finde ich unprofessionell . Am meisten schockiert hat mich jedoch , dass sie sich nach diesem Gespräch geweigert hat , meine Schilddrüse überhaupt zu untersuchen , mit der Begründung , das würde keinen Sinn machen . Stattdessen kam sie innerhalb einer einzigen Sitzung zu dem Schluss , ich hätte Depressionen , und verschrieb mir – mit 35 Jahren – Antidepressiva , ohne eine gründliche Untersuchung oder weiterführende Diagnostik . So eine Behandlung habe ich noch nie erlebt . Ich habe mich weder ernst genommen noch respektvoll behandelt gefühlt . Sehr enttäuschend . Lautes Auftreten , abwertende Kommentare und voreilige Diagnosen sind für mich in keiner Weise akzeptabel . Dieser Termin war eine große Enttäuschung und für mich absolut nicht empfehlenswert .

review_text: If you’re heading out to the New Settlement for a meal , this spot is a solid contender , though there are a few things you should keep in mind before you park the car . The food quality itself is wonderful—you can tell the ingredients are fresh and the kitchen knows what they’re doing with their seasoning—but you definitely shouldn't come here if you're already "starving" or in a rush . The preparation takes its sweet time , so it’s much better suited for a long , relaxed family lunch or a slow weekend dinner where the conversation is the main event while you wait . ​As for the menu , I gave the tarb a shot , and while the taste was authentic , it was a bit of a heavy hit . The mandeel was way too thick for my liking , making it a bit over - fatty rather than having that perfect , thin melt - in - your - mouth crunch you look for . If you aren't a fan of a really heavy wrap , you might want to ask them to lean it out or try one of their other grilled platters , which were excellent . ​The saving grace during the long wait for the food was definitely the staff . They were incredibly pleasant and had that genuine Egyptian hospitality that makes you feel welcome rather than just another table number . Even with the kitchen running slow , their attitude kept the vibe positive . It’s a great addition to the New Settlement dining scene , just go in expecting a slow - paced experience and maybe a bit of a heavier hand on the traditional grills

review_text: İftar için rezervasyon yapıp gittik . Yaklaşık 10 - 15 dakika kadar yerimize geçmek için bekledik . Bir Türk olarak yemekleri puanlamam gerekirse 8 . 5/10 diyebilirim ( 1 . 5 puanı lahmacunun az baharatı ve iskender kebaptan kırdım ) . Ayrıca , bir Türk olarak Ali Nazik Kebabı şiddetle öneririm , harikaydı . Atmosfer fena değildi . Ancak hizmet , garsonlar ve servis hızı aşırı kötüydü . Çorbayı 3 kez tekrar hatırlatmak durumunda kaldık ve ekip birbirinden bağımsız hareket ettiğinden ekstra çorba getirdiler . Yemek sonrası çay ve kahveyi de yine aynı şekilde en az 20 dakika gecikmeli ve tekrar tekrar hatırlatarak ancak alabildik . Sütlaç Brulee'yi de sipariş edip 25 dakika bekledikten sonra masaya gelmediği halde hesapta görünce hesaptan çıkarılmasını istedik hiçbir problem çıkarmadan hemen çıkardılar . Sonuç olarak; lezzetler gerçekten çok iyi . Orijinal türk yemeklerine aşırı yakın lezzetler sunuyorlar ama hizmetlerini geliştirmeleri gerekiyor . Karşılama ve sipariş süreci gerçekten çok çok zayıf . İngilizce bilen bir müdür vardı olabildiğince yardımcı olmaya çalıştı ama ekiple ilgili pek olumlu yorum yapmam maalesef mümkün değil . Hizmetlerini düzelttikleri takdirde kesinlikle önereceğim bir mekan olur .

review_text: Como todos los restaurantes de esta zona , no es el mejor sitio en el Cairo ni el más económico , pagas por las vistas de las pirámides . Sabíamos que iba a estar hinflado de precio pero he de decir que nos sorprendió para bien . La comida estaba bastante rica , el servicio decente , y no era un sitio muy turístico ya que estaba lleno de locales . No tienes consumición mínima por lo que puedes ir a tomar bebidas y ya está . El precio fue menos de lo que esperábamos , nos gastamos unos 6€ por persona ( por supuesto creo que nos cobraron lo que quisieron , pero aún así ) y cenamos decentemente . Las vistas de las pirámides preciosas así que lo recomiendo totalmente , creo que de los de la zona es el más económico y se está a gusto para ver el espectáculo de luces . Eso sí , el sitio está al final de un callejón de mala muerte , pero existe y no tuvimos problemas de seguridad . Llegamos y nos fuimos en taxi .

review_text: Pendant nos 4 nuits au Four Seasons , nous sommes retournés deux fois dans ce restaurant tant nous avons été satisfaits . Avant tout , la vue sur le Nil est absolument spectaculaire . Installés près de la baie vitrée , on voit le fleuve d’un seul coup d’œil , et au moment du coucher de soleil l’ambiance change complètement : un vrai “spot vue” comme on les aime . Après une journée de visites , s’y poser ne serait - ce qu’un moment est déjà un vrai moment de détente . Côté cuisine , c’est une cuisine égyptienne à la fois savoureuse et légère , avec une sensation “healthy” . Beaucoup de fraîcheur : légumes , huile d’olive , légumineuses/céréales , grillades… Rien de trop lourd , l’assaisonnement reste équilibré , et on ressort avec l’impression d’avoir mangé un vrai bon repas , sans fatigue . Le choix est large , ce qui permet aussi de composer selon ses envies . Et le service mérite une mention spéciale . Mohamed a été remarquable : il explique le menu avec beaucoup de clarté , décrit les ingrédients et les saveurs avec précision , et ses recommandations sont vraiment pertinentes . En plus d’être très aimable , il sait mettre les clients à l’aise avec une grande élégance . On aimerait que ce niveau d’attention et de professionnalisme soit la référence partout . Je recommande vivement si vous voulez profiter d’un bon repas en prenant le temps , avec une vue magnifique sur le Nil , ou si vous cherchez une cuisine égyptienne plus “healthy” pendant votre séjour . Si je reviens au Caire , j’y retournerai sans hésiter .

Ideal para disfrutar del panorama , pero no esperes una comida memorable .

review_text: Above all , the service was very poor . Despite having a reservation , we were told upon arrival that it was not in the list . While this may have been a communication error , the staff at the 40th - floor reception then told us that the restaurant was fully booked for the day . However , we were eventually allowed to enter , and throughout our stay , only about one - third of the seats were actually occupied . I never received a convincing explanation for this inconsistency . Furthermore , even though we were staying at the same hotel , we were told that charging the bill to our room was not possible and were strongly asked to pay on the spot . This was my first time experiencing such treatment at a Hilton - affiliated property , and it felt unacceptable for a hotel of this standard . The food was also disappointing . In particular , the ribeye steak was extremely tough , almost rubbery , and far from enjoyable . While the base prices themselves are not especially high , service charges and taxes are added , increasing the final bill by roughly 30% compared to the displayed prices . This may have been an oversight on my part , but at the very least , these additional charges were not clearly or prominently stated , so caution is advised . The only positive aspect was the view , which was excellent . That said , the blue lighting felt tasteless to me personally .

review_text: Tajori is a wonderful spot for anyone looking to experience authentic Egyptian cuisine , The restaurant offers a beautiful oriental atmosphere , with tasteful traditional décor and soft music that perfectly matches the experience . One of its biggest highlights is the view overlooking the Nile . . As for the food , the experience was excellent overall . The chicken yogurt fatta was outstanding . . honestly the best fatta I’ve ever had , and highly recommended . The mixed appetizers platter was generous and very enjoyable; the crispy roqaak was delicious , the mombar was excellent , and the stuffed vegetables " mahshy " were very good . However waraq enab was average . The eggplant with meat "messakaa " was rich and flavorful , the lentil soup ( Adas ) was very well prepared , A special mention goes to the freshly baked bread made in - house with butter warm , flavorful , and absolutely delicious . Service was another strong point . Mr Saleh , the restaurant manager , is extremely kind , welcoming , and professional , which adds a very personal and pleasant touch to the whole experience . Overall , I highly recommend Tajori for anyone looking for Egyptian oriental food & peaceful atmosphere .

review_text: اليوم الجمعة ١٢ ديسمبر طلبت اورد من عندهم ومن ضمنه بيض ولكنهم ارسلوا لي بيض للاسف منتهي صلاحيته تاريخ انتاجه 22 نوفمبر اي مضي علي انتاجه 20 يوم ومدة الصلاحية المكتوبه من الشركة المنتجة علي الكرتونة هي 21 يوم فقط ولولا اني انتبهت الي تاريخ الصلاحية كان ممكن ان تتاذي صحة اسرتي واتصلت بالمندوب وطلبت منه ارجاعه او استبداله بمنتج جديد لايتعدي علي انتاجه اكثر من ثلاثة ايام وبعدها اتصل بي مسؤول وابلغني انه سيرسل مندوب بعد ساعة ولكن مرت اكتر من 4 ساعات ففمت باعادة الاتصال بهم وقدمت شكوي عبر الهاتف فاتصل بي المسؤول مرة اخري وتحدث معي بشكل غير لائق وزعل جدا لاني قلت له ان ذلك يعرضني ويعرض العملاء لمشاكل صحية ولولا تقديري للماركت كنت حررت محضر بالشرطة فما كان منه ان احتد في كلامه وقال بتحدي اعمل محضر وانا مش هاابعت المندوب وانا اتقدم الي ادارة الماركت بشكوي رسمية ضد هذا المسؤول الذي يعرض صحة العملاء للخطر ويسيء الي سمعة المتجر الذي نقدمه ونتعامل معه لهذا اتقدم بشكوي الي ادارة المتجر رقم الاوردر 5632150

review_text: El hotel es toda una experiencia . Para bien y para mal . La recepción esta abierta toda la noche y son atentos , bien . Las habitaciones , pese a tener muchos años , tienen unos acabados muy pintorescos e interesantes . Muebles de colección por todo el hotel . Pero , también tiene olores un tanto extraños y las instalaciones precisan de una renovación más pronto que tarde . La terraza del ático está muy bien , salvo la musica que la tienen demasiado fuerte . Para mi lo peor fue con diferencia el desayuno . Tardaron más de media hora en prepararlo , y no entiendo el porqué . Me explico , el café de polvo soluble , queso con pepino ( muy seco de nevera ) , y lo más increíble fue una rebanada de bizcocho más seco y rancio que sacado de una tumba de Giza . Poe cierto , si necesitas Internet fiable aquí no lo hay . Por lo demás el personal es correcto y amable .

review_text: We often visit this restaurant , but this time we were very disappointed . First of all , the sushi portions have become much smaller than they used to be . While this is unpleasant , we could still assume that inflation has affected them . We also ordered the all - you - can - eat set , but the service was extremely slow . Each order took a very , very long time to arrive . It was obvious that this is part of their policy to delay the orders so that customers get tired of waiting and leave without fully receiving what they paid for . However , when we received the bill , we noticed discrepancies between the prices listed on the menu and the prices charged on the bill ( 16pcs for 500 instead of 443egp and all u can eat for 1250 instead of 1100 ) . This is simply dishonest and feels like taking advantage of customers . In the menu screenshots , you can clearly see the difference between the stated prices and the final amount we were charged . I do not believe this is how a respectable establishment should operate . This experience was unacceptable . I am deeply disappointed , will not return , and will also warn my friends about this place .

review_text: I stayed here alone for a few nights in Cairo and felt completely safe . The hotel is right in the central business area , so everything—restaurants , cafes , cinemas , and shops—is within easy reach . The building is a bit old , and the elevator can feel a little creepy , but the rooms are clean , simple , and comfortable enough for a solo traveler . This isn’t a high - end hotel , so it’s best to manage your expectations . That said , it’s very affordable , breakfast is included , and the staff are incredibly friendly and helpful . They also offer airport pickup and tour packages , which made exploring the city stress - free . Overall , it’s a safe , convenient , and good - value option for anyone visiting Cairo on a budget . I would definitely stay here again !

We arrived at 2 a . m . after booking through agoda for two nights , but the hotel had no record of our reservation and claimed they don’t work with agoda . After half an hour of explaining and showing proof , they said the room had leakage issues and moved us to another hotel in the middle of the night . The building itself looked like it had been abandoned for 100 years — dark , eerie , and empty . The lift was an old , manual one straight out of the 1920s , and we were taken to the fourth floor with no guard or staff around . The next morning , the other hotel kept calling us to leave and return to the first one . Overall , a terrible , stressful , and unprofessional experience . I wouldn’t recommend this place to anyone .

review_text: I’ve been a loyal member at this gym for 6 years , and unfortunately my recent experience has been extremely disappointing . During my pregnancy , I froze my membership . Later , when I decided to cancel the freeze , the process was poorly handled and I was never clearly informed about my new expiration date . There was zero transparency or proper communication from the management . The very next day after my membership expired , I came with a friend who was invited as a guest ( potentially a new member ) , and we were completely denied entry unless I renewed immediately — with a membership price that was suddenly doubled , despite no new facilities , very limited equipment , and no added value whatsoever . What’s more disappointing is the total lack of appreciation for long - term loyal members . I have raised this issue more than 4 times , each time I’m asked to “file a complaint , ” yet no one ever follows up or resolves anything . Just empty promises and repeated calls with no action . This gym clearly prioritizes short - term profit over customer loyalty , professionalism , and basic respect . I would not recommend this place unless management seriously reconsiders how they treat their long - standing members .

review_text: I saw that other reviews rated Dai Pescatori as either absolutely stellar or completely abysmal , so I really didn't know what to expect . Turns out , it was lovely ! The music was Mexican and the art was a mix of Egyptian/Sufi mysticism , but the food was 100% Italian . The space was calm , clean , the servers seemed like naturally happy people , and the food was amazing . I highly recommend the lasagna ! We'll be back for sure and try the desserts as well . I do want to address the cost complaint that many seem to have , though . It's true that the dishes were probably the most expensive I've seen , particularly considering the portions . If they go any higher , it likely won't be worth it as a customer . However , I always try to consider operational costs . You cannot realistically compare a restaurant located in Sarayat to have the same prices as somewhere in , say , Hadayek; the rent ( and space ) for the building , the quality of staff ( who I hope are getting paid a living wage ) , the quality of ingredients , maintenance , the education and skill of the chef and kitchen staff , etc . . . they're just not the same . When you go out to eat , you're paying for the location , convenience , experience , hygiene , and ( God - willing ) good food . Put simply , you get what you pay for . Enjoy !

review_text: I had an awesome time staying at Bella Hostel ! It’s right in the middle of Cairo , at Midan Talat Harb , so you’re super close to everything literally . . restaurants , galleries , you name it . It’s perfect if you don’t want to spend ages in transportation . The team there . . . Mirna , Sahar , and Om Mohamed were amazing . They made us feel so welcome and really went out of their way to help . The place was super clean , and the rooms and bathrooms were well kept . Yeah , the water pressure is a bit on the gentle side , but that just adds to the vintage charm of the place . If you’re after something super luxurious , this might not be it , but if you want that authentic , vintage Cairo vibe , you’ll love it . It really feels like stepping into the heart of the city . The kitchen’s got everything you need for a quick meal or breakfast , and the views are pretty awesome , as you can see in the pics . All in all , I had a fantastic stay and would totally recommend Bella Hostel if you want to experience Cairo in a genuine way EMO_POS

review_text: Some practical points to prepare for , based on my experience : - The building is on a lively street with outdoor restaurant seating below , popular for food and shisha at night . Expect noise from cars and people through the night; the windows don’t block sound well . - The building is very old with a distinct cat urine smell on entry . The beautiful art deco stairs and walls show signs of sinking and wear . Be ready to climb stairs , as accommodations are on higher floors offering views . - My room had a private bathroom and clean bath towels , which was nice . However : - The shower head knob was broken with a plastic replacement limiting movement . - Water pressure in the shower was mostly low with occasional bursts . - The sink tap was broken and ran scalding hot even near the cold setting; it also leaked water onto and below the sink . - Slippers were provided but were worn , dirty , oversized men’s slippers . - Windows offer a decent neighborhood view but are wooden - framed with mostly covered glass , letting little light in when closed . You need to open them fully for fresh air and light , but this invites flies . The windows have a broken triangular hole—fine in mild weather but could cause cold drafts or let in insects depending on season . Ask for extra sheets in winter or insect protection in summer . - The floor air conditioning was very noisy , making sleep difficult even with earplugs . - Despite requesting a balcony room , my message was unanswered and I did not get one . - Due to these issues , I left 1 night early and moved to a different accommodation .

review_text: 宿泊施設は、期待外れというよりも、衛生かつ安全面でも不安があり、他の旅行者が同じような思いにならないよう防ぎたくレビューを書きます。 結論から、おすすめしません。 虚偽の掲載、写真、間違った住所、掃除の行き届いていない宿です。 アゴダで「Bella Casa Hostel」を予約しましたが、サイトに掲載されている写真とはまったく異なり、非常に不快な体験をしました。 まず、Google検索すると「La Bella Casa Hostel」という名前の宿泊所が近くに表示されますが、この場所は存在しないフェイクです。 アゴダやブッキングドットコムに記載されている住所は正確ではなく、41度の猛暑の中、約1時間半も探し回る羽目になりました。しかも、建物の外には宿の名前を示す看板も一切ありません。 チェックイン時間は12 : 00のはずが、13 : 45に到着した時点で「前の客が出たばかりだから待ってくれ」と言われ、待たされた事に強く不審な気持ちになりました。 スタッフの方は笑顔ですが、ゲストが欲している事を理解することが難しい様でした。 宿泊するゲストの気持ちになっていただけたら、ここにツラツラと書いた内容は対応できるはずです。残念な気持ちでしかありません。

review_text: نظرا لجفاف بشرتي الشديد مؤخرا ، حجزت جلسة ترطيب عميق . مع ذلك ، اقتصرت معظم الجلسة علي تنظيف عميق مع ترطيب طفيف . خضعت لجلسة تقشير دقيق ، وتنظيف بالملعقة ، وازالة الرؤوس السوداء ، وجلسة تفتيح البشرة . لكن من الواضح ان المعالجة لم تكن تجيد استخدام جهاز التقشير الدقيق والملعقة بشكل صحيح ؛ كانت العملية مؤلمة للغاية ، وشعرت بالم شديد في بشرتي . هذا النوع من العلاج يلحق الضرر بالطبقة القرنية من الجلد . طلبت ايضا جلسة مانيكير في نفس الوقت ، بتكلفة 300 جنيه مصري . لكنها اقتصرت علي تقليم الجلد المحيط بالاظافر فقط ، دون وضع طلاء اظافر . بعد طلبي ، وضعت طلاء الاظافر بشكل سطحي ، ما لم يكن مانيكيرا علي الاطلاق . علاوة علي ذلك ، استغرق طلاء الاظافر وقتا طويلا ليجف ( 10 دقائق ) وكان غير متناسق . اضافة الي ذلك ، كان روتين العناية بالبشرة لديها دون المستوي المطلوب ، ومع ذلك طلبت 2200 جنيه مصري . اعتقد انها لم تتخرج من تدريبها الطبي . انها لا تعرف كيفية استخدام ادوات التجميل بشكل صحيح لتقديم تجربة خدمة افضل لزبائنها .

review_text: رحتلهم علي الاسعار حقت المنيو و جاني واحد طويل و نحيف وكان لابس اسود اداني اسعار مختلفه لان عرفو اننا خليجيين و يقولون انها الاسعار الجديده و غير عن منيو القديم في الواتساب و كنا حاجزين معاهم اكريليك نيلز من ٦ ونص و خلونا نسوي فيك نيلز مع جيل الساعه ١٠ و يدخلون ناس يسوون لهم قبلنا و الجيل ثاني يوم بدا يتقشر و التركيب مركبين ظفر عريض ظفر صغير و مسوين ظفر مايل و ظفر مشطوف و طلعلنا فطريات التونسيه كان تعاملها كويس بس الي يزعل انها عارفه و كل الاستف يعرفون انو ناصب علينا و كيف تبغون عملاء دائمين عندكم و هذا قاعد ينصب علي كيفه ؟ فين الذمه و الضمير و حاول فينا ندفع فلوس كاش We checked the prices on their WhatsApp menu , but when we arrived , a tall , slim guy wearing black gave us completely different prices after realizing we were Gulf customers . He claimed these were “new prices” and different from the old menu . We had booked acrylic nails at 6 : 30 PM , but they made us wait until 10 PM and convinced us to do fake nails with gel instead . Meanwhile , they kept letting other customers go before us . The gel started peeling the very next day . The nail application was terrible — one nail was wide , another was small , one was crooked , another was unevenly filed . On top of that , we ended up with fungal infections . The Tunisian staff member had a good attitude , but what’s disappointing is that she and the rest of the staff clearly knew what was happening . If this is how you treat customers , how do you expect to have loyal clients? Where is the honesty and professionalism? He even tried to make us pay in cash . Very unprofessional and disappointing experience . I would not recommend this place .

review_text: Easily one of the best places to get value for your money , - Food is cuisine like quality and experience for much cheaper prices Note : all the food tastes good , and i especially recommend the Polinari Pasta , it is a big bowl and it gets Two people stuffed , you can just get an appetizer beside it for variety , but it really is perfect and the portion like I said is for 2 , I also the Chicken Mushroom Main dish , it is really good and tasty , just a heads up , make a reservation prior going as they take a lot of time preparing the main dishes because they serve them fresh , that is if you don't love waiting , but it is really worth the wait , Lasagna is good and the portion is also for 2 , but after finishing the bowl , you'll end up hating the color red from the amount of tomatoe sauce you've eaten : face_with_tears_of_joy : . Pizzas are good but they are not amazing , you'll not be wowed from it like the other plates , if you want to try it though , I really recommend the primavera with extra cheese ( with no blue cheese , or olives because pizza is not the food to add those on ) , the one with pineapples is also good , it's just a bbq pizza with pineapples on it , they do not put a lot of pineapple on it so it is not overwhelming the other flavors , it just gives a kick of sweetness that tastes good , but again pizza will not wow you , it's just a good pizza . Ask for their spicy sauce bottle if you love spicy , it is really really good and it'll leave you very satisfied . - Service is great , and the people are lovely there , especially El Capitano , his hospitality and friendliness is what made us fsll in love with this hidden franchise , to the point that we sometimes ask prior going what branch is the Capitano at so we can meet him . - Atmosphere is very beautiful and peaceful , it should resemble the local restaurants of Italy , of course , I do not know how much of resemblance there is because I've never been to Italy , but I guarantee you'll feel comfy there , they just need to buy AC for the summer as their portable water cooling fans do not do enough work to cool you in that hot weather , but you can spend everyday of your week there in Winter . Overall I really with the deepst regret recommend the place as much as I hate to do it , as it's been a special spot for me , and in a selfish way you just want to keep it to yourself , but I really wish them all the best ! : heart_suit :

review_text: I used to visit this salon from time to time and previously had positive experiences because the stylists were attentive to my needs and vision . Unfortunately , my most recent visit was very disappointing . The hairstylist/owner , Joseph , did not seem to actively listen to what I was asking for and appeared to be rushing through the appointment . Despite clearly stating that maintaining length was my top priority , my hair was cut much shorter than requested and the bangs turned out poorly . I also mentioned several times that cutting my hair while wet might not be the best approach since my hair is curly , but after some insistence I trusted his recommendation . Unfortunately , the final result did not turn out well . I also found some of the comments about my hair being dry unnecessary and somewhat embarrassing , especially when they were made “jokingly” in front of other staff members , despite me already explaining the reason . I also noticed that videos were being taken during the appointment without my consent , which made me uncomfortable . Considering the outcome and the experience overall , the service felt overpriced and disappointing . Based on this visit , I would not recommend this salon , particularly for people with curly hair . I hope the salon takes this feedback seriously and becomes more attentive to clients’ requests in the future .

review_text: I can’t say enough good things about this salon—it’s truly a gem ! From the moment you walk in , the atmosphere is welcoming , stylish , and relaxing . The staff is incredibly professional , knowledgeable , and friendly . I have naturally curly hair , and finding someone who knows how to cut it properly is no small task . But here , they absolutely *nailed* it ! Paul is a master in his trade . He understood my curls , shaped them beautifully , and gave me the best cut I've had in years . It’s clear that he’s trained in handling all hair types , which is such a refreshing experience . However , to get Paul specifically to cut your hair , you need to call them for an appointment . Their coloring services are just as impressive . The colorist took the time to consult with me about what I wanted and recommended shades that would complement my skin tone . The result? A rich , vibrant color that looks natural and fresh—and it’s holding up beautifully weeks later . I also treated myself to a mani - pedi , and again , the service was top - notch . The space was clean , tools were sanitized , and the technician was meticulous and gentle . My nails have never looked better ! If you’re looking for a salon that really listens , delivers consistently excellent results , and makes you feel pampered , this is the place . Highly recommend for cuts , color , curls , and nail care alike !

review_text: A scam . Reviews are bought or their own family members . Especially tourists - beware . Read this for 2 minutes and save a lot of money . I went in to get my nails done . A simple nude hard coat with reference photos . No length added . It looked professional in clean so I let my guard down , huge mistake . They have NO set prices and charge you whatever they think you'd pay . Since im foreign I got significantly overcharged but they even overcharge the locals . I wouldn't even be that mad if the nails looked good , but its genuinely the worst they have ever looked . Uneven coat , lumpy , no cuticle softener was used , just straight scraping . Look at the photos to see how uneven it is . You can see tiny holes aswell . She didn't file them down or anything . No hate to her but she was completely untrained . I was charged 67 dollars or 3200 Egyptian pounds . WELL over what is normally charged in this area , and more expensive than CALIFORNIA USA . I showed them how bad it looked and pointed out the imperfections , and they told me it was because "your nails are too short . " They are not and ive gotten my nails done many times with no issues for half the price . Do not consider this place . Do not let positive reviews sway you . It is not worth it and you'll spend more money and time fixing it later .

review_text: Hôtel absolument à éviter ! Cloaque innommable dans un état pitoyable voir dangereux et reposant de saleté . Les deux premiers étages de ce bouge sont délabrés , complètement détruit . La cage d'escalier est d'une saleté repoussante et compte tenu de l'état de l'ascenseur , on est obligé de monter à pied . Dans la chambre , les huisseries sont défectueuses , les prises électriques cassées et dangereuses et dans le salle de bain , le rideau de douche est pendu à trois mètres de hauteur et ne touche pas le sol , la douche est un artefact de douche à l'italienne mais limitée par une mauvaise bordure en ciment et carrelage . Le pommeau de douche est cassé et fuit dans tous les sens . Les WC fuis ainsi que le lavabo . Aucun tapis de douche n'est fourni . Aucune chaise pour appuyer des affaires n'est présente . Les baguettes d'angle sont tenues par du scotch . Sur le balcon , les tuyaux des blocs de clim pendent au milieu . Vous devez les enjamber et la rambarde n'est pas à hauteur réglementaire : vous risquez la chute à chaque tentative pour prendre l'air . . . Le petit déjeuner . . . Infâme , vous avez la montre , Ils ont le temps ! Il est servi dans couvert et si un groupe de touristes débarque dans ce soukh , vous pouvez rester à attendre votre tour jusqu'à midi : l'organisation est déplorable . Dans la chambre , les huisseries sont défectueuses , les prises électriques cassées et dangereuses et dans le salle de bain , le rideau de douche est pendu à trois mètres de hauteur et ne touche pas le sol , la douche est un artefact de douche à l'italienne mais limitée par une mauvaise bordure en ciment et carrelage . Le pommeau de douche est cassé et fuit dans tous les sens . Les WC fuis ainsi que le lavabo . Aucun tapis de douche n'est fourni . Aucune chaise pour appuyer des affaires n'est présente . Les baguettes d'angle sont tenues par du scotch . Sur le balcon , les tuyaux des blocs de clim pendent au milieu . Vous devez les enjamber et la rambarde n'est pas à hauteur réglementaire : vous risquez la chute à chaque tentative pour prendre l'air . . . Le petit déjeuner . . . Infâme , vous avez la montre , Ils ont le temps ! Il est servi dans couvert et si un groupe de touristes débarque dans ce soukh , vous pouvez rester à attendre votre tour jusqu'à midi : l'organisation est déplorable . review_text: A women's only gym that has all the basics you need in terms of equipment and weights . They offer classes at certain times ( no yoga ) as well as personal training . If you're there during peak hours , you'll struggle to find the more common weights ( only two sets ) , and many of the machines need quite a bit of TLC ( missing knobs , out of service regularly etc ) but they've changed some of the padding of some machines since I've been there . Update : all above still valid however I feel I must add the below warning . There are children regularly allowed to run around and play in the weight zones ( super dangerous ) with little to no supervision ( even saw one smack someone's bum ) . Here are signs everywhere saying don't leave your bag in the weight area , that's what lockers are for . . . . And yet there are constantly bags and clothing everywhere; completely unenforced by any staff member there . The professionalism leaves to be desired . If you're not picky , it may be a bit more pricey , but there's another gym nearby that's better .

review_text: للاسف الشديد ، مركز الفارابي للاسنان يتراجع للخلف وللاسوا يوما بعد يوم ، لا احترافية ، لا اتقان في العمل ، … . حصل معي موقفين خلال ٢٠٢٥ و بداية ٢٠٢٦ ، اثبتت بالفعل انه لابد من البحث عن مركز اسنان اخر حتي اكمل علاجي فيه . فشل في تركيب وزراعة الاسنان ، مع الام شديدة و نتيجة غير مرضية بالنسبة لحجم ما تم زراعته . لا احترافية عند دخول المريض عند الدكتور ( الدكتور يتحدث مع الممرضة خلال العمل علي الاسنان باحاديث جانبية و هامشية و شخصية لا تهم المريض ، بل تزعجه ) ومرات الدكتور يقوم بتوبيخ الممرضة بشكل غير لائق تماما ، مما يزعج المريض . وغير ذلك … . ارجو التخلص من هذه المشاكل والعودة بمركز الفارابي لسابق عهده الجميل والرائع والمرضي للجميع .

review_text: My 11 - day stay at Nile X was extremely stressful and disappointing . Before booking my flight , I had communicated through the Booking . com chat that I would arrive around 5 am and asked if early check - in would be possible . I received an “ok” response , so I planned my travel accordingly . However , when I arrived I was told early check - in was not possible and was asked to pay an additional 60 USD to access the room between 6 am and noon . When I showed screenshots of the conversation , the owner denied that early check - in had been confirmed . The location was also misleading . I had been told it would be very close to Zamalek X Hostel , but it turned out to be on a quiet and uncomfortable street , and the property itself is on the 19th floor , something that was never mentioned . The elevator felt unsafe and unstable . The “Nile view” room description was also inaccurate . The windows were not double - glazed , so the room was extremely noisy , and the actual Nile view was minimal . Several basic amenities advertised were missing or poor : Breakfast advertised as included , but in practice there was almost nothing provided . Kitchen was poorly equipped and unhygienic , lacking basic items like a proper frying pan , knife , or mugs . I ended up buying my own ingredients and making my own breakfast most days . Bathroom lacked essentials , including toilet paper . The bed was unstable , with loose wooden planks supporting the mattress . This was only partially fixed near the end of my stay . Staff frequently asked me to pay the extra fee in cash and knocked repeatedly on my door , which felt uncomfortable and intrusive . Overall , the stay involved misleading information , poor maintenance , lack of hygiene , and stressful interactions with management . Unfortunately , this experience made my time in Cairo far more difficult than it should have been .
